publishedAbstract: Ceph Pods (MON/MGR/MDS/OSD) are unable to schedule and the Rook Ceph Operator logs show: "`Error while reconciling: Not enough nodes found: Expected 3, found 2`". Looking at the output of command "`oc get nodes--show-labels`" will show all 3 nodes with the correct label, but 1 is wrong. ~~~ odf0.lib2.domain.cc: cluster.ocs.openshift.io/openshift-storage= odf1.lib2.domain.cc: cluster.ocs.openshift.io/openshift-storage=true odf2.lib2.domain.cc: cluster.ocs.openshift.io/openshift-storage= ~~~ To check for correct labels, use this command as it filters out typos. ~~~ $ oc get nodes-l cluster.ocs.openshift.io/openshift-storage= NAME STATUS ROLES AGE VERSION odf0.lib2.domain.cc Ready infra 37d v1.31.14 odf2.lib2.domain.cc Ready infra 37d v1.31.14 ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF:  Ceph Pods (MON/MGR/MDS/OSD) are unable to schedule and the Rook Ceph Operator logs show: "Error while reconciling: Not enough nodes found: Expected 3, found 2".
